","backgroundColour":"white","primaryImage":null},{"__typename":"MediaBlock","id":"4VgBF7N7uPkEmbFcs1aZCm","mediaTitle":"What is GBIF?","body":"

GBIF—the Global Biodiversity Information Facility—is an international network and data infrastructure funded by the world's governments and aimed at providing anyone, anywhere, open access to data about all types of life on Earth.

","optionalImg":{"file":{"url":"//images.ctfassets.net/uo17ejk9rkwj/7kcarX51BOYKPbEQVTbr5J/bbe62b49ee66e02cbfd54870b6279eb8/whatisgbif.png"},"title":"What is Available under public domain via the Biodiversity Heritage Library"}}]},{"__typename":"CarouselBlock","id":"54dwUEyuWyhyAsF7b7KeQH","title":"Data use","body":null,"backgroundColour":"light","features":[{"__typename":"MediaCountBlock","id":"6Mu6DhEVj4hH1pdN4N2IOZ","mediaTitle":"Climate change","body":"

Biodiversity loss and climate change interact in many ways, reflecting two sides of the same problem: humanity’s unsustainable relationship with the natural world. Explore the research relying on data from the GBIF network to understand and assess the growing impact that changing temperatures, precipitation and other climate-related phenomena are having on biodiversity.

","optionalImg":{"file":{"mobile":"https://api.gbif.org/v1/image/jZb3hYFUhEbrI_hprLBoYSHy7_I=/500x400/http%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fuo17ejk9rkwj%2F3XIFYv7n3XJMNLbZkNLKRq%2F6bc385472038cbd72071e81d6b284c06%2FSenna_reticulata.jpg"},"title":"Senna reticulata","description":"Senna reticulata (Willd.) H.S.Irwin & Barneby observed in Manaus, Brazil by crax (CC BY-NC 4.0)"},"reverse":null,"subtitle":"Peer-reviewed papers using data","titleCountPart":"https://api.gbif.org/v1/literature/search?literatureType=journal&topics=CLIMATE_CHANGE&relevance=GBIF_USED&peerReview=true&limit=0","backgroundColour":"light","roundImage":true,"callToAction":[{"label":"Featured","url":"/resource/search?contentType=dataUse&topics=CLIMATE_CHANGE"},{"label":"See all","url":"/resource/search?contentType=literature&literatureType=journal&topics=CLIMATE_CHANGE&relevance=GBIF_USED&peerReview=true"}]},{"__typename":"MediaCountBlock","id":"2EaB2IZyt95T93ENEfl3eO","mediaTitle":"Invasive alien species","body":"

Information is the single most important variable necessary to support research, monitoring and management of alien and invasive species. From identifying and predicting potential invasions to improving management applications, detection strategies, and risk assessments, GBIF plays a pivotal role in fulfilling data needs about these costly and disruptive forces of change.

","optionalImg":{"file":{"mobile":"https://api.gbif.org/v1/image/C7sfpe0eRJiffNOmtb7jf3WCO2E=/500x400/http%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fuo17ejk9rkwj%2F22GcyHpeYoIm01iUdKtyYW%2F174e3bc2ef8864c701cdf14a0f8ca256%2FSphagneticola_trilobata.jpeg"},"title":"Sphagneticola trilobata","description":"Sphagneticola trilobata (L.) Pruski observed in Macao by Jeremy J Busfield (CC BY-NC 4.0)"},"reverse":null,"subtitle":"peer-reviewed papers using data","titleCountPart":"https://api.gbif.org/v1/literature/search?literatureType=journal&topics=INVASIVES&relevance=GBIF_USED&peerReview=true&limit=0","backgroundColour":"white","roundImage":true,"callToAction":[{"label":"Featured","url":"/resource/search?contentType=dataUse&topics=INVASIVES"},{"label":"See all","url":"/resource/search?contentType=literature&literatureType=journal&topics=INVASIVES&relevance=GBIF_USED&peerReview=true"}]},{"__typename":"MediaCountBlock","id":"2foEuWWIO78y2nkDKXmuTK","mediaTitle":"Human health","body":"

Knowing where the species that transmit disease-causing pathogens occur is important for recognizing, managing and preventing potential threats to human communities. Data shared through the GBIF network enables scientists and researchers to map the wild host, vector and reservoir species involved in cycles of disease transmission and how their distributions are changing.

","optionalImg":{"file":{"mobile":"https://api.gbif.org/v1/image/5Rw1yi4UL4DezPkpZcPTEzn4yAg=/500x400/http%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fuo17ejk9rkwj%2F35X9AdJshQjS2wphysaxWQ%2F289bfb1fae0ce1eeafd20efa7f676496%2FRhinolophus_pusillus.jpg"},"title":"Rhinolophus pusillus","description":"Rhinolophus pusillus Temminck, 1834 observed in Shizuoka, Japan by Ryosuke Kuwahara (CC BY-NC 4.0)\n"},"reverse":null,"subtitle":"Peer-reviewed papers using data","titleCountPart":"https://api.gbif.org/v1/literature/search?literatureType=journal&topics=HUMAN_HEALTH&relevance=GBIF_USED&peerReview=true&limit=0","backgroundColour":"white","roundImage":true,"callToAction":[{"label":"Featured","url":"/resource/search?contentType=dataUse&topics=HUMAN_HEALTH"},{"label":"See all","url":"/resource/search?contentType=literature&literatureType=journal&topics=HUMAN_HEALTH&relevance=GBIF_USED&peerReview=true"}]},{"__typename":"MediaCountBlock","id":"18k48x86cFCh0xYgXLMhYw","mediaTitle":"IUCN Red List of Threatened Species™","body":"

GBIF-mediated data is used for mapping species distributions and for calculating Area of Occupancy (AOO) and Extent of Occurrence, measures key to assessing threat level and categorizing species on the Red List.

","optionalImg":{"file":{"mobile":"https://api.gbif.org/v1/image/5rXfOezLgQoc-Fjy52GrFZE1jcs=/500x400/http%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fuo17ejk9rkwj%2F2YqFuddbyGAuNIxIiCHAg8%2Ff7d077529eeb084d107bccdd973a8985%2FDanaus_plexippus_ssp._plexippus.jpeg"},"title":"Danaus plexippus ssp. plexippus (zoomed)","description":"Danaus plexippus subsp. plexippus observed in Querétaro, Mexico by Christine Cieslak Campelo (CC BY-NC 4.0)"},"reverse":null,"subtitle":"species assessments citing GBIF","titleCountPart":"https://api.gbif.org/v1/literature/search?limit=0&source=IUCN%20Red%20List%20of%20Threatened%20Species","backgroundColour":"white","roundImage":true,"callToAction":[{"label":"Latest updates","url":"https://www.gbif.org/news/6I8ZfVsvKD9T6sGY4Inmex/"},{"label":"See all","url":"https://www.gbif.org/resource/search?contentType=literature&source=IUCN%20Red%20List%20of%20Threatened%20Species"}]}]},{"__typename":"MediaBlock","id":"1DmeEnIuajhMdPL9DBGIUf","mediaTitle":"Thematic communities","body":"

GBIF's data, infrastructure and services support cross-disciplinary research, creating new opportunities for evidence-based science and decision-making. With guidance from the GBIF Science Committee, we monitor signals from who's sharing and using data to pursue strategic opportunities with impact, continuously seeking to improve the quality, relevance and utility of biodiversity data for a wide array of communities across science, technology and policy.

","optionalImg":{"file":{"url":"//images.ctfassets.net/uo17ejk9rkwj/43r4BqpdbeCu6KP5XDklpD/082ede547597bc897b246ea26e9af225/hub-illustrations.png"},"title":"thematic-hexagons","description":""},"reverse":true,"subtitle":null,"backgroundColour":"white","roundImage":false,"callToAction":[{"label":"Learn more","url":"/composition/2SEGqoMS8eMVos9T1owEEk"}]},{"__typename":"CarouselBlock","id":"3rrE0VbNQf8ILRWsK72np9","title":"Programmes and projects","body":null,"backgroundColour":"gray","features":[{"__typename":"MediaCountBlock","id":"vdt55mrJ0gsJWZyBEyqvU","mediaTitle":"Hosted portals","body":"

GBIF hosted portals offer simple, customizable websites that support biodiversity data use and engagement at national, institutional, regional and thematic scales. This service, which Participant nodes and their partners can apply to anytime, lowers the technical demands for delivering relevant biodiversity data to communities around the world.

","optionalImg":{"file":{"mobile":"https://api.gbif.org/v1/image/Y6MpQ1G3y3pxFnahhi1qoBwHWGk=/500x400/http%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fuo17ejk9rkwj%2F52JqfOWHKtAzMvInJ081Lq%2Fe184e96161bde298b940086c0edea1d4%2Ffabellina-web.jpg"},"title":"flabellina-hostedportal","description":"Mediterranean violet aeolid Flabellina affinis (Gmelin, 1791), Observed in Spain. Photo 2021 Adrie Rolloos via iNaturalist Research-grade Observations, licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0."},"reverse":null,"subtitle":"Hosted portals","titleCountPart":"72","backgroundColour":"white","roundImage":true,"callToAction":[{"label":"Learn more","url":"https://www.gbif.org/composition/3kQFinjwHbCGZeLb5OhwN2"}]},{"__typename":"MediaCountBlock","id":"xbtIcBIpdxSnzEnni8SHh","mediaTitle":"BID: Biodiversity Information for Development","body":"

Biodiversity Information for Development (BID) is a multi-year programme funded by the European Union and led by GBIF with the aim of enhancing capacity for effective mobilization and use of biodiversity data in research and policy in the ‘ACP’ nations of sub-Saharan Africa, the Caribbean and the Pacific.

","optionalImg":{"file":{"mobile":"https://api.gbif.org/v1/image/yzRxk44apBZyCsskYnPe9v8zWpQ=/500x400/http%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fuo17ejk9rkwj%2F6dTc6sopckMg4aY6Mc6ia2%2F47326d4ce4cfa35c1733d02997f62f39%2Fbid-last.jpg"},"title":"Biodiversity information professionals examining a herbarium sheet","description":"Team consultation at the BID Capacity Enhancement Workshop: Data use for decision-making, Cape Town, South Africa, 11 April 2018. Participants (left to right): Ernest Lamptey, Raymond Owusu-Achiaw, Donald Mpalika, Elizabeth Mwafongo, Jacqueline Sapoama Kumadoh, Hannah Owen. Photo Maheva Bagard Laursen | GBIF, licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 2.0."},"reverse":false,"subtitle":"projects","titleCountPart":"/api/resource/search?contentType=project&programmeId=82243&limit=0","backgroundColour":"white","roundImage":true,"callToAction":[{"label":"Learn more","url":"/programme/82243"},{"label":"Explore all projects","url":"/composition/4y6ndyH9emZfbybrz72XqL"}]},{"__typename":"MediaCountBlock","id":"4XdAi8wD9qWL3OQtNgxXh7","mediaTitle":"BIFA: Biodiversity Information Fund for Asia","body":"

BIFA—the Biodiversity Information Fund for Asia—provides supplementary support for existing activities within the GBIF network, addressing the needs of regional researchers and policymakers through mobilization and use of biodiversity data. The programme is the outcome of a contribution from the Ministry of the Environment, Government of Japan, earmarked for activities in Asia.

","optionalImg":{"file":{"mobile":"https://api.gbif.org/v1/image/l_v8Fr_g446s2KCbYqxR-IH4vok=/500x400/http%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fuo17ejk9rkwj%2F5VUr1pur9yqYCN58qsO6OT%2Fbeb1e2674790c08915f7718c4b67a211%2FDay1_group_.jpg"},"title":"Closing ceramony, BIFA3_023","description":"Group photo by Dina Setyaningrum licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0"},"reverse":null,"subtitle":"projects","titleCountPart":"/api/resource/search?contentType=project&programmeId=82629&limit=0","backgroundColour":"white","roundImage":true,"callToAction":[{"label":"Learn more","url":"/programme/82629/"},{"label":"Explore all projects","url":"/composition/4KDMRLw5oQu81uH1X1pEpo"}]},{"__typename":"MediaCountBlock","id":"265vUT0dNwo4ajZlWMWWwc","mediaTitle":"Capacity Enhancement Support Programme","body":"

This programme aims to address specific capacity needs identified by GBIF Participants by facilitating collaboration at regional and global levels, providing co-funding for capacity enhancement projects based on combinations of mentoring activities, regional training workshops and documentation.

","optionalImg":{"file":{"mobile":"https://api.gbif.org/v1/image/sa1hQyJEc5u6noXSqQxiwJkU82E=/500x400/http%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fuo17ejk9rkwj%2F5pcxUflU04XAilyAc6Bcnt%2Ffb8ac0925ef0bd728db0d04a38acca68%2FJatropha-gossypiifolia-iNat-schulting-web.jpg"},"title":"Jatropha-gossypiifolia-iNat-schulting-web","description":"Bellyache bush (Jatropha gossypiifolia), Amansi East district, Ghana. Photo 2019 Steven Schulting via iNaturalist Research-grade Observations, licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0."},"reverse":null,"subtitle":"projects","titleCountPart":"/api/resource/search?contentType=project&programmeId=82219&limit=0","backgroundColour":"white","roundImage":true,"callToAction":[{"label":"Learn more","url":"/programme/82219"},{"label":"Explore all projects","url":"/composition/4R5Ot70guupksCkTNbq1oe"}]},{"__typename":"MediaCountBlock","id":"7a02Z2oERjWVZehNU50fy2","mediaTitle":"Northern Eurasia","body":"

Starting in 2018, the Finnish Biodiversity Information Facility (FinBIF), the GBIF national node for Finland, has provided funding directed toward support of projects that mobilize biodiversity data and promote national training and capacity-building activities around data publishing in the region.

","optionalImg":{"file":{"mobile":"https://api.gbif.org/v1/image/NAnkBVwQqCn8fmF_xKYBbBJKtI4=/500x400/http%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2Fuo17ejk9rkwj%2F7MahWZgcJq8Ousy0cEmAi0%2F0c17fbae4fed494e6e6c6430ddf5215b%2Foriginal__3_.jpg"},"title":"Malacosoma castrense","description":"Malacosoma castrense by Robin Bad via iNaturalist.
